# Publish Obsidian content safely

Read [architecture](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) and the content-pipeline path instructions.

1. Determine whether the source belongs in the polished blog, public notes, or neither.
2. Modify source selection or templates, never generated Markdown or HTML.
3. Run sync and report source commit, copied, unchanged, excluded, and collision evidence.
4. Build all three outputs and run build-quality checks for routes, metadata, and links.
5. Keep blog and note information architecture separate while preserving explicit cross-links.
